avoid: Applying parenthesis normalization (normalize_invisible_parens) to code in fmt: off sections
Letting the normal statement visitor methods execute for unformatted code
Mixing unformatted line handling with standard formatting path transformations
recommended_action: When formatting is disabled (# fmt: off), ensure that all code normalization functions that modify syntax structure are skipped
Check that unformatted line visitors do not invoke functions that make parentheses invisible or modify structural elements
Verify that context switches between formatted and unformatted modes maintain semantic integrity of the source code

avoid: Relying on variables only defined within try-except blocks when they may be needed outside
Using for-else with incomplete exception tracking across iterations
recommended_action: Check variable scope: when using a for-else construct with exception handling, ensure all variables referenced in the else clause or after are properly initialized
Ensure parser fallback logic handles all grammars correctly without leaving critical variables undefined
Verify that ParseError handling in a loop properly chains all exceptions so the final error message includes context

avoid: Using Path.name attribute when displaying file paths to users (shows only basename)
Assuming filename alone is sufficient identification in multi-file operations
recommended_action: When displaying file paths in user-facing output, use the full path not just the filename
For Path objects, use str(src) to get full path, not src.name which returns only the filename
Check diff/output functions that display file identifiers to ensure they show complete paths for clarity

avoid: Unconditionally adding trailing commas in all delimiter split scenarios
Failing to distinguish import statements from other code when applying comma rules
Assuming standard trailing comma rules apply uniformly across all statement types
recommended_action: Avoid adding trailing commas in from...import statements even when delimiter_split encounters commas
Check if a line is an import statement before conditionally adding trailing commas
Exclude import statements from automatic trailing comma insertion logic

avoid: Leaving print() or logging.debug() statements in middle of token generation loops
Failing to clean up temporary debugging code from code paths that are performance-critical or output-sensitive
recommended_action: Remove debug print statements from production code
Debug statements like print() calls left in tokenizer/parser modules can interfere with token output and cause parsing failures
Scan for stray debugging code before merging

avoid: Assuming all atoms with simple structure can have invisible parens without checking content type
Overlooking that string literals are atoms and may span multiple lines
Making parentheses invisible for atoms without validating the atom contains only simple expressions
recommended_action: When handling parentheses visibility in atoms, check for multiline string literals before making parens invisible
Multiline strings (those containing newlines) should retain their surrounding parentheses for proper formatting
Add explicit type/content checks before modifying structural elements that affect code readability
